images.prompt: Evening under the Gare de Lyon train-shed, a blue sleeping-car with a brass ISTANBUL board, porters loading leather cases, gold-lit clock tower beyond the glass; plate.
Milano Centrale's monumental steel-and-stone train hall at morning, an express drawn up alongside, travellers stretching on the platform; plate.
Santa Lucia station steps meeting the Grand Canal, a waiting vaporetto, city domes low on the far bank under a pale sky; plate.
A gas-lamp-lit night platform, uniformed officials checking papers along a sleeping-car corridor, breath visible in the cold; plate.
A Balkan station at first light, a dark-green express beneath wooded hills, a vendor with a tea urn on the platform; plate.
Sirkeci terminus with its Ottoman-revival facade and stained-glass fanlights, a blue sleeping-car at the buffers, the Bosphorus bright beyond; plate.
